key_drivers: Iran war: largest oil supply disruption in history (IEA -8M bpd March), WTI +50% since Feb 28 to ~$96
Rising real yields (~1.94% TIPS) + hawkish Fed hold (99%+ probability at March 18 meeting) = primary equity headwind
USD strength (DXY 100.05, +3.2% 1-month) pressuring commodities and non-USD FX
HY credit spreads widening (264 bps Jan → 312 bps mid-March) = bearish for risk assets, especially RTY
RBA back-to-back hike to 4.1% today (March 17) but AUD underperforming on risk-off + China PMI weakness
BoJ hawkish stance + expected hike by June = bullish 6J (JPY safe haven + rate convergence)
VIX 23.52 (risk-off) but falling today (-13.47%) on equity relief rally

fallbacks_used: TIPS real yield: TIPSwatch.com (primary FRED DFII10 confirmed ~1.94%)
HY OAS: Social media/news sources (primary FRED BAMLH0A0HYM2 confirmed ~312 bps)
Gold ETF flows: SeekingAlpha/WGC summary (WGC data portal requires login)
